resources.description: 4.17M etymological relationships between terms across 19,400+ languages. Core file with relationship types (inherited, borrowed, cognate, etc.), confidence scores, and language metadata.
19,401 languages from Glottolog: family trees, geographic coordinates, speaker counts, endangerment status.
4,981 expert-annotated cognate groups from Lexibank IE-CoR (Indo-European Cognate Relationships benchmark).
105,484 PHOIBLE 2.0 phoneme entries with articulatory features (manner, place, voice) for 2,177 languages.
76,475 WALS typological feature values (word order, tone, case marking, etc.).
